# Luxury Properties Ltd — Premium Real Estate in Nigeria
> Lagos, Nigeria | https://luxurypropertiesltd.com.ng

Luxury Properties Ltd is Nigeria's premier luxury real estate agency. We specialize in buying, selling, and renting exclusive high-end properties in Lagos, Abuja, and across Nigeria. Our services include concierge real estate service, off-market listings, expert advisory, property management, and investment advisory.

## Pages

- [Home](https://luxurypropertiesltd.com.ng) — Premium real estate in Nigeria
- [Properties](https://luxurypropertiesltd.com.ng/properties) — Browse luxury properties for sale and rent
- [Buy](https://luxurypropertiesltd.com.ng/buy) — Buy luxury property in Nigeria
- [Rent](https://luxurypropertiesltd.com.ng/rent) — Rent property in Nigeria
- [Sell](https://luxurypropertiesltd.com.ng/sell) — Sell your property with us
- [About](https://luxurypropertiesltd.com.ng/about) — Best luxury real estate agency Nigeria
- [Services](https://luxurypropertiesltd.com.ng/services) — Real estate services
- [Agents](https://luxurypropertiesltd.com.ng/agents) — Our real estate agents
- [Reviews](https://luxurypropertiesltd.com.ng/reviews) — Client reviews
- [FAQ](https://luxurypropertiesltd.com.ng/faq) — Frequently asked questions
- [Contact](https://luxurypropertiesltd.com.ng/contact) — Contact us
- [EPAN](https://luxurypropertiesltd.com.ng/epan) — Estate Professionals Association Network

## Core Services

- **Property Sales**: Expert guidance through the entire buying and selling process
- **Property Leasing**: Comprehensive leasing services for residential and commercial spaces
- **Property Management**: Full-service management to protect and enhance your investment
- **Investment Advisory**: Strategic advice to maximize your real estate portfolio returns
